info.title: Foxentry API
info.description: Foxentry is an autocomplete and validation tool that corrects user data errors in real-time. It provides validation and search capabilities for company, email, location, name, and phone data.

post.description: Validates company data including name, registration number, tax number, and VAT number. Supports Czech Republic, Slovakia, and Poland.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing bearer token

post.description: Search and autocomplete for companies based on name, registration number, or other criteria.
Retrieve detailed company data based on search criteria.
Validates an email address with basic or extended validation. Extended validation checks real existence and deliverability.
Autocomplete and search for email addresses.
Validates location data including street, city, zip code, and country.
Localize a position based on GPS coordinates or IP address.
Validates a person's name or surname.
Validates a phone number with basic or extended validation.
Search for phone number prefixes by country.

BearerAuth.description: API key passed as a bearer token in the Authorization header.

ClientInfo.description: Optional client context information for more relevant results

singleLocationResultDistance.description: GPS radius for search area in meters

data.description: Validated data fields specific to the endpoint

tags.name: Company
tags.description: Company validation, search, and data retrieval

tags.name: Location
tags.description: Location validation, search, data retrieval, and localization

tags.name: Phone
tags.description: Phone number validation and prefix search
